overall_assessment: Core Milestone 1 foundation scope is delivered and validated, but explicit trusted-proxy configuration and the documented security-header/CSP baseline remain unaddressed at the feature level.

findings.title: Trusted proxy behavior is not explicitly configured
findings.summary: The milestone requires explicit proxy-trust behavior for the expected reverse-proxy topology, but no implementation or documentation of trusted-proxy configuration is present.

findings.title: Security-header/CSP baseline is not implemented
findings.summary: Milestone 1 documents a baseline security-header/CSP direction, but no concrete implementation or deployment enforcement point is defined in the delivered feature.

follow_up_feature_requests: Implement explicit trusted-proxy configuration for the API and document the forwarded-header contract for the production reverse-proxy topology.
Implement and document the Milestone 1 baseline security-header/CSP policy, including enforcement location and any required in-scope exceptions.
